name: private-scratch-wallet
description: Private Scratch Wallet — confidential autonomous DeFi risk policies with iExec Nox concepts on Sepolia.

scripts.deploy:sepolia: npm run compile && hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia --no-compile
scripts.final: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run compile && npm run test && npm run preflight
scripts.zero:local: npm run preflight && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run compile && npm run test
scripts.ship: npm run zero:local && npm run prepare:submission
scripts.max:local: npm run doctor && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run compile && npm run test && npm run smoke:ui && npm run sepolia:ready && npm run prepare:submission
scripts.after:deploy: npm run export:frontend-config && npm run build && npm run prepare:submission
